name: chain_acquisition_launch_hn_sitefire_yc_w2
method: [ACQUISITION] Launch HN: Sitefire (YC W26) – Automating actions to improve AI visibility

stages.task: Pull local/SMB businesses from Google Maps or yelp_scraper.py in niche verticals (law, dental, HVAC, restaurants). Target businesses with weak GEO signals.
For each prospect, query Perplexity + OpenAI web search: does this business appear in AI answers for their core keywords? Score 0-10. Generate 1-page audit PDF via playwright HTML-to-PDF.
Send cold email with audit attached: 'Your business scored 2/10 for AI visibility — here is what that means and how to fix it.' Use cold_email_sender.py with personalized subject per audit score.
